For small and medium sized companies, this creates potential to reduce administrative burden, accelerate routine processes, and improve the use of organizational knowledge. This paper argues that the near term value of Agentic AI does not lie in full autonomy or workforce reduction, but in controlled partial autonomy for simple and medium complexity business processes. It proposes an integration framework covering use case suitability, autonomy levels, technical integration, governance, security, employee enablement, and measurable impact. The paper concludes that Agentic AI can become a productivity lever when implemented as a human centered capability with responsibility and accountability retained by people.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic AI（代理型人工智能）在中小企业中的近期价值不在于完全自主或裁员，而在于对简单到中等复杂度业务流程实施受控的部分自主，并提出了一个涵盖用例适配性、自主级别、技术集成、治理、安全、员工赋能和可衡量影响的集成框架。
AI.motivation: 中小企业面临行政负担重、流程效率低、知识利用不充分等问题，而现有自动化或对话AI方案难以满足其灵活处理多步骤、工具交互型任务的需求，因此需要探索Agentic AI的务实落地路径。
AI.method: 通过分析Agentic AI与传统自动化和对话AI的差异，提出一个面向中小企业的集成框架，包含用例适配性评估、自主级别划分、技术集成方案、治理与安全保障、员工赋能以及影响衡量等维度。
AI.result: 论文认为Agentic AI的近期价值在于受控的部分自主，而非完全自主，并给出了一个可操作的集成框架来指导中小企业落地实施。
AI.conclusion: Agentic AI要成为生产力杠杆，必须以人为中心来实施，将责任和问责权保留在人类手中，而非追求完全自动化或人员替代。

title: Analyzing Visual Aircraft Representations with Sparse Autoencoders
summary: Vision models can achieve strong performance on classification tasks, but the internal representations supporting their predictions are often difficult to interpret. This work investigates whether sparse autoencoders can decompose intermediate representations of a vision model into interpretable features. We train a ConvNeXt classifier on the FGVC-Aircraft dataset, extract spatial activations from its final feature stage, and train a sparse autoencoder on these activations. The learned sparse features are analyzed using top-activating image patches, activation strength, and class selectivity. Qualitative visual inspection reveals that several features correspond to recognizable aircraft structures and visual patterns. We evaluate a subset of selected features using input-space and feature-space ablations, measuring how blurring image patches and suppressing sparse features affect class logits, classification margins, and prediction confidence. The results suggest that sparse autoencoders can reveal partially interpretable, class-relevant visual features associated with aircraft recognition, while also exposing limitations such as polysemanticity and coarse spatial localization.

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用稀疏自编码器分解ConvNeXt视觉模型的中间表征，在FGVC-Aircraft数据集上训练后，发现可以提取部分可解释、与类别相关的飞机结构特征，但也存在多义性和空间定位粗糙等局限。
AI.motivation: 视觉模型在分类任务上表现优异，但其内部表征难以解释，作者希望探究稀疏自编码器能否将视觉模型的中间表征分解为可解释的特征。
AI.method: 在FGVC-Aircraft数据集上训练ConvNeXt分类器，提取最终特征阶段的空间激活值，训练稀疏自编码器；通过top激活图像块、激活强度、类别选择性等分析稀疏特征，并使用输入空间和特征空间消融实验评估。
AI.result: 部分特征对应可识别的飞机结构和视觉模式；消融实验表明稀疏特征与类别相关；但也发现多义性和粗空间定位的问题。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏自编码器能揭示部分可解释的、与类别相关的视觉特征，但存在多义性和定位粗糙等局限性，仍需进一步改进。

title: Scalar-Stepsize Nonuniform Monte Carlo Optimistic Policy Iteration: A Certified Counterexample
summary: Tsitsiklis proved convergence of Monte Carlo optimistic policy iteration under a uniform update structure and identified nonuniform update frequencies as a delicate obstruction. We give a certified negative answer for the natural scalar-stepsize, unnormalized asynchronous state-value recursion with fixed nonuniform state-selection probabilities. In a three-state, two-action discounted MDP, the nonuniform update frequencies induce a diagonally scaled greedy-policy mean field with a certified nonconstant attracting hybrid periodic orbit. With a bounded unbiased geometric-horizon estimator and Robbins--Monro stepsizes, the original stochastic recursion remains trapped near the cycle with positive probability and therefore fails to converge. The example pinpoints a geometric obstruction: uniform sampling gives radial residual contraction, whereas scalar nonuniform sampling anisotropically distorts the residual dynamics and can generate switched attracting cycles.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了非均匀更新频率会导致异步强化学习中的策略迭代发散，在三状态MDP中非均匀采样会产生吸引性的混合周期轨道，而均匀采样则不会。
AI.motivation: Tsitsiklis证明了蒙特卡洛乐观策略迭代在均匀更新结构下收敛，但指出非均匀更新频率是一个微妙的障碍。本文旨在给出一个严格的否定答案，证明非均匀更新频率确实会导致发散。
AI.method: 在三状态、两动作的折扣MDP中，分析了非均匀状态选择概率下的标量步长、非归一化异步状态值递归。通过将非均匀更新频率诱导的贪心策略平均场建模为对角缩放的形式，并分析其动力学行为。
AI.result: 非均匀更新频率产生了一个非恒定的吸引性混合周期轨道。使用有界无偏几何水平估计器和Robbins-Monro步长时，原始随机递归以正概率被困在周期附近，因此无法收敛。
AI.conclusion: 均匀采样产生径向残差收缩，而标量非均匀采样各向异性地扭曲残差动力学，可能产生切换吸引周期，这是非均匀更新导致发散的几何本质原因。

title: From Affect Prediction to Affect Forecasting: Evidence for Distinct Information Sources in Longitudinal Text
summary: Modeling dimensional affect in longitudinal text requires distinguishing current affect estimation from future affective change forecasting. Existing approaches often treat each text as an independent observation and apply similar assumptions to both tasks, without testing whether they rely on different information sources. This paper investigates that distinction using longitudinal self-reported ecological essays and feeling-word entries. We propose the Trait--State Affective Prediction (TSAP) framework and its temporal extension E-TSAP for per-text valence and arousal prediction, evaluated on a held-out prediction test set of 1,737 entries from 91 users. We further propose the Affective Change Forecaster Hybrid (ACF-Hybrid) for next-step affective change forecasting, evaluated on a held-out forecasting test set of 46 users. For prediction, E-TSAP achieves composite Pearson correlations of 0.670 for valence and 0.449 for arousal. For forecasting, textual representations perform worse than compact numeric trajectory baselines: the text-inclusive model achieves only r=0.316 for valence and r=0.284 for arousal, whereas a simple prior-state baseline reaches r=0.615 and r=0.670, respectively. ACF-Hybrid, using dimension-specific numeric trajectory features, achieves r=0.659 for valence and $r=0.658$ for arousal. These results show that textual semantics support current affect prediction, whereas future affective change is better captured through prior numeric trajectory dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TSAP和E-TSAP框架用于文本情感预测，以及ACF-Hybrid用于情感变化预测。结果表明文本语义有助于当前情感预测，而未来情感变化更依赖于先前的数值轨迹动态。
AI.motivation: 现有方法常将每个文本视为独立观测，并在当前情感估计和未来情感变化预测两个任务上采用相似假设，未检验它们是否依赖不同的信息源。
AI.method: 提出TSAP及其时间扩展E-TSAP用于每文本效价和唤醒度预测，以及ACF-Hybrid用于下一步情感变化预测。
AI.result: 预测任务：E-TSAP综合皮尔逊相关系数效价0.670、唤醒度0.449。预测任务：文本包含模型效价r=0.316、唤醒度r=0.284；简单先验状态基线效价r=0.615、唤醒度r=0.670；ACF-Hybrid效价r=0.659、唤醒度r=0.658。
AI.conclusion: 文本语义支持当前情感预测，而未来情感变化更好地通过先前数值轨迹动态来捕捉。

title: ST-DiffEye: Diffusion-based Continuous Gaze Generation via Joint Scanpath-Trajectory Modeling
summary: We study the problem of human gaze modeling, which aims to generate the gaze patterns a viewer produces while observing a visual stimulus. Gaze is primarily captured through two modalities: continuous eye-tracking trajectories, which describe fine-grained motion dynamics, and discrete scanpaths, which describe high-level fixation structure. Because gaze varies substantially across viewers and trials, we treat this variability as a defining property rather than noise and model gaze as a stochastic generative process. Existing generative gaze models supervise on only one of these two representations in isolation. We hypothesize that trajectories and scanpaths describe gaze at complementary scales and are jointly informative during training, and test this hypothesis through ST-DiffEye, a joint trajectory-scanpath diffusion framework that couples both modalities by concatenating them as an additional raw input channel, requiring no architectural overhead beyond an input and output channel expansion. We further introduce a principled evaluation framework based on the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS), which generalizes any existing sequence similarity metric into a proper scoring rule that jointly assesses the accuracy and diversity of generated gaze. Experiments on task-driven visual search, covering both target-present and target-absent scenarios, and on free-viewing benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. These results, along with detailed ablations, confirm the benefit of joint modeling and the value of distribution-aware evaluation in capturing the intrinsic variability of human gaze. Project webpage: https://st-diffeye.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出ST-DiffEye，一种联合眼动轨迹与扫视路径的扩散框架，通过将两种模态拼接作为额外输入通道，并引入基于CRPS的评估方法，在多项基准测试中取得最优性能，验证了联合建模对捕捉人类注视固有变异性的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式注视模型仅单独监督眼动轨迹或扫视路径两种表征之一，忽略了二者在互补尺度上描述注视行为的价值。本文假设轨迹和扫视路径在训练时联合使用能提供更丰富的信息。
AI.method: 提出ST-DiffEye，一种联合轨迹-扫视路径扩散框架，通过将两种模态直接拼接作为额外的原始输入通道（仅需扩展输入输出通道，无需额外架构开销）；并提出基于连续排序概率评分（CRPS）的评估框架，将现有序列相似性度量泛化为同时评估生成注视准确性与多样性的适当评分规则。
AI.result: 在任务驱动视觉搜索（含目标存在与目标缺失场景）和自由观看基准测试上均取得最先进性能。详细消融实验证实了联合建模的优势以及分布感知评估在捕捉注视固有变异性中的价值。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模眼动轨迹与扫视路径能更好地捕捉人类注视的随机生成过程，CRPS评估框架为生成式注视模型提供了更全面的评价标准。

title: Do Safety Monitors Stay Reliable After an Update? Benchmarking and Predicting Activation-Monitor Staleness
summary: Activation monitors-lightweight probes trained on a language model's internal representations-are an increasingly common layer in deployment safety stacks. Deployed models however are rarely static: they are quantized, fine-tuned, adapted with LoRA, or served with merged adapters while the monitor remains frozen. We present the first systematic test of whether this implicit contract holds: whether activation monitors trained on a base model remain reliable after these routine model updates. Across multiple safety-relevant monitors, model depths, update families, and open-weight models, we find a sharp split: quantization-style updates largely preserve frozen probe performance, while fine-tuning-style updates frequently make probes stale. Fragility is highly monitor-dependent, with privacy/PII probes most affected and refusal-compliance probes comparatively stable, showing that retraining a behavior need not stale its corresponding monitor. QLoRA is especially damaging despite NF4 quantization alone being relatively benign, suggesting that quantization becomes riskier when combined with adaptation. We further show that degradation is predictable from pre-deployment features, enabling revalidation budgets to be triaged toward the monitors most likely to fail. These results suggest that fine-tuning should trigger activation-monitor revalidation by default, while prediction can help prioritize which monitors to check first.

AI.tldr: 本文系统测试了激活监控器（activation monitors）在模型经过量化、微调、LoRA适配等常规更新后是否仍然可靠。结果表明：量化类更新基本不影响监控器性能，而微调类更新常导致监控器失效（尤其隐私/PII监控器受影响最大）。QLoRA特别有害，且退化程度可通过部署前特征预测。
AI.motivation: 实际部署的语言模型经常被量化、微调、LoRA适配或合并适配器，但激活监控器通常是冻结的。这种"隐式契约"（监控器在模型更新后仍保持可靠）是否成立，此前缺乏系统性验证。
AI.method: 对多个安全相关的监控器、不同模型深度、多种更新类型（量化、微调、LoRA、QLoRA等）及多个开源模型进行系统性测试，评估冻结监控器在模型更新前后的性能变化，并尝试从部署前特征预测退化程度。
AI.result: 量化类更新基本保留监控器性能；微调类更新频繁导致监控器失效；隐私/PII监控器受影响最大，拒绝合规监控器相对稳定；QLoRA尤其有害；退化程度可从部署前特征预测。
AI.conclusion: 微调应默认触发激活监控器重新验证，而基于预测的优先级排序可帮助决定先检查哪些监控器。

title: User as Code: Executable Memory for Personalized Agents
summary:
A personalized AI agent needs a user memory: a persistent model of who the user is, built across many conversations and consulted on each new one. Today this memory is almost always stored as unstructured text, a knowledge graph, or a flat store of facts, and consulted by retrieval -- fetching the entries most similar to the current request. Such "bag-of-facts" memory recalls individual facts well, but because storing a fact and acting on it are separate steps, it struggles to resolve contradictions, aggregate over many records, or enforce rules. We argue that user memory should instead be executable. We introduce User as Code (UaC), a paradigm in which an agent's model of a user is a living software project: typed Python objects hold the user's state and ordinary Python functions encode the rules that govern it, so representing and reasoning about the user happen in one medium an interpreter can run. The enabling mechanism is a two-phase pipeline: an append-only log that never discards a fact, periodically checkpointed into typed code.
  This changes what memory can do. On standard long-term conversation benchmarks, UaC matches both a full-context upper bound and the strongest prior memory systems on recall (78.8% on LOCOMO). Its advantage emerges where representation matters most. On aggregate questions over a user's history -- "how many international trips did I take last year?" -- retrieval-based memory collapses (6-43%) while UaC stays near-perfect (99%), because the answer is a one-line computation over typed state rather than a search over text. And because its rules execute deterministically whenever the state changes, UaC can surface unsolicited, safety-critical alerts -- such as a newly prescribed drug that conflicts with an allergy recorded months earlier -- a capability query-driven memory cannot provide.

AI.tldr: 提出“用户即代码”(UaC)范式，将用户记忆建模为可执行的Python代码而非非结构化文本，通过附加日志和定期检查点机制，在长对话、聚合查询和安全预警任务上显著优于传统检索式记忆。
AI.motivation: 传统“事实袋”式检索记忆存在三个根本缺陷：难以处理矛盾信息、无法跨多条记录聚合、不能强制执行规则，因为存储事实与基于事实行动是分离的。
AI.method: 两阶段管线：1) 只增日志（不丢弃任何事实）；2) 定期检查点将日志编译为带类型的Python代码（对象+函数），使状态表示与推理在同一可执行媒介中完成。
AI.result: 在LOCOMO基准上召回率78.8%（匹配全上下文上界）；聚合查询准确率99%（检索式仅6-43%）；能主动触发药物冲突等安全警报，检索式无法实现。
AI.conclusion: 可执行用户记忆在需要逻辑推理、聚合计算和主动约束的场景中具有本质优势，将记忆从被动检索数据转变为主动运行的程序。

title: Selective Synergistic Learning for Video Object-Centric Learning
summary: Typical video object-centric learning (VOCL) approaches employ slot-based frameworks that rely on reconstruction-driven encoder-decoder architectures, where learning is mediated by two spatial maps: attention maps from the encoder and object maps from the decoder. As these two distinct maps exhibit different properties, a recent dense alignment strategy attempted to reconcile this discrepancy by enforcing agreement across all spatio-temporal patches via contrastive learning. However, this indiscriminate alignment inadvertently propagates the inherent weaknesses of each module, such as noisy encoder predictions and blurred decoder boundaries. Moreover, computing dense similarities across all pairs incurs a computational cost quadratic in the total number of spatio-temporal patches, severely limiting scalability. Motivated by this, we propose Selective Synergistic Learning (SSync). Instead of exhaustive patch-to-patch alignment, SSync prevents error propagation by selectively distilling only the most reliable cues: leveraging the encoder strictly for boundary refinement and the decoder for interior denoising. This is realized via a pseudo-labeling with linear complexity, eliminating the need for quadratic spatial comparisons. Also, to prevent the reinforcement of architectural biases like slot redundancy, we introduce a transitive pseudo-label merging that consolidates overlapping slots based on spatio-temporal activation consistency. Extensive studies demonstrate that SSync improves decomposition quality and serves as a versatile, plug-and-play module while also exhibiting exceptional robustness to slot configurations. Code is available at github.com/wjun0830/SSync.

AI.tldr: SSync是一种选择性地对齐编码器注意力图和解码器对象图中最可靠线索的视频目标中心学习方法，通过线性复杂度的伪标签策略和传递性伪标签合并，避免了传统密集对齐的噪声传播和高计算成本问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于slot的视频目标中心学习方法中，编码器的注意力图和解码器的对象图存在不同特性，传统的密集对齐策略会无差别地传播两者的固有弱点（如编码器的噪声预测和解码器的模糊边界），且计算复杂度高（与时空patch数量呈二次关系），限制了可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出选择性协同学习（SSync）：1）选择性蒸馏，仅利用编码器进行边界细化、解码器进行内部去噪，避免错误传播；2）采用线性复杂度的伪标签策略，避免二次空间比较；3）引入传递性伪标签合并机制，基于时空激活一致性合并重叠的slot，防止架构偏见（如slot冗余）。
AI.result: SSync在多个数据集上显著提升分解质量，可作为即插即用模块，且对slot配置具有出色的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SSync通过选择性对齐而非无差别密集对齐，有效解决了现有方法中误差传播和计算开销大的问题，是一种高效且鲁棒的视频目标中心学习改进方案。

title: Decomposing one-class support vector machine into an ensemble of one-data support vector machines
summary: One-class classification (OCC) is a classification problem in which the training data contains only one class. The one-class support vector machine (OCSVM) is one of the most competitive OCC algorithms. However, OCSVM has scalability issues with large-scale datasets. This paper proposes the acceleration strategy of OCSVM. The idea is to decompose the dataset into samples and train OCSVM models for single data points. Subsequently, ensemble learning is applied to combine all models to compute the OCSVM model for the dataset. In addition, further acceleration is achieved through a data-reduction strategy with an OCSVM model trained on the average of the training samples. The experiment compared the proposal and traditional OCSVM using the Python package. The proposed strategy is faster than traditional OCSVM, while achieving similar classification results. Moreover, the proposed strategy can create one-to-one correspondence between samples and models. Source code is uploaded at https://github.com/ToshiHayashi/ODSVM

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种加速OCSVM的策略，通过将数据集分解为单个样本训练模型，再结合集成学习与数据缩减方法，在保持分类性能的同时显著提升处理大规模数据集的速度。
AI.motivation: 传统OCSVM在处理大规模数据集时存在可扩展性问题，计算效率低下，需要更高效的加速策略。
AI.method: 首先将数据集分解为单个数据点并分别训练OCSVM模型，然后通过集成学习将所有模型组合；此外，利用基于训练样本均值的OCSVM模型进行数据缩减策略实现进一步加速。
AI.result: 与Python包中的传统OCSVM相比，所提策略在保持相似分类结果的同时，运行速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 该加速策略有效解决了OCSVM在大规模数据上的可扩展性问题，且能在样本与模型之间建立一一对应关系，代码已开源。

title: Medical world models: representing medical states, modelling clinical dynamics and guiding intervention policies
summary: Medical diagnosis and treatment are dynamic processes in which patient states evolve over time and clinical interventions alter future outcomes. Although current medical AI can detect disease, estimate risk and generate reports, many systems still return static labels or scores, offering limited insight into how illness may progress or how alternative interventions may reshape its trajectory. Medical world models adapt the world-model idea from artificial intelligence to healthcare by learning internal simulators of patient-state dynamics. Their long-term goal is to help clinicians anticipate deterioration, compare treatment-conditioned futures and tailor care to individual patients. Yet relevant work remains scattered across foundation models, longitudinal modelling, disease simulation, treatment-effect estimation, reinforcement learning and digital twins. To bridge this gap, this review outlines a roadmap for advancing medical AI from isolated diagnosis and prediction toward medical world models that simulate disease evolution and support intervention decisions. This roadmap is organized around three coupled capabilities: patient-state construction, clinical dynamics modelling and intervention decision support. Across representative systems, the comparison highlights what each capability contributes and how partial components can be integrated into more mature perception--dynamics--planning systems. Finally, we identify the challenges involved in turning plausible rollouts into clinically useful simulators. Related literature is available at https://github.com/1999kevin/awesome_medical_world_models.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了医学世界模型的概念，提出了一个从静态诊断向动态疾病模拟与干预决策支持转变的路线图，围绕患者状态构建、临床动态建模和干预决策支持三个核心能力展开讨论。
AI.motivation: 当前医学AI多返回静态标签或评分，无法捕捉疾病随时间演变的动态过程及不同干预对病程的影响，亟需能模拟患者状态变化的动态模型。
AI.method: 通过综述现有文献，提出一个三能力路线图：患者状态构建、临床动态建模和干预决策支持，并对代表性系统进行对比分析。
AI.result: 明确了各能力在医学世界模型中的贡献，以及如何将部分组件整合为更成熟的感知-动态-规划系统。
AI.conclusion: 医学世界模型有潜力将AI从孤立诊断推向动态模拟和干预决策支持，但仍面临将合理推演转化为临床有用模拟器的诸多挑战。

title: Track2View: 4D-Consistent Camera-Controlled Video Generation via Paired 3D Point Tracks
summary: Re-rendering an existing video from a novel camera viewpoint requires the output to follow the prescribed camera trajectory while preserving the appearance and dynamics of the original scene across every frame. Existing methods rely on per-frame pose embeddings, noisy point-cloud renderings, or implicit learned correspondences, none of which provides an explicit, temporally continuous link between source and target pixels. We propose Track2View, which conditions a video diffusion transformer on paired 3D point tracks: sparse trajectories of scene points projected into both the source and target camera views. These tracks provide explicit spatiotemporal correspondences that are temporally continuous by construction, encoding what content should appear where and when. At the core of Track2View is a dual-view track conditioner that transfers visual context from source to target view through parameter-free geometric operations and learned temporal aggregation, ensuring generalization to arbitrary camera trajectories without memorizing specific motions. We further introduce a data curation pipeline that extracts one-to-one track correspondences by running a 3D point tracker on temporally concatenated multi-camera view pairs. On a 400-video benchmark spanning static and dynamic scenes, Track2View achieves state-of-the-art results across visual quality, view synchronization, and camera accuracy, reducing rotation error by 30-65% and translation error by 61-72% relative to leading baselines. Project page is available at this https URL: https://qjizhi.github.io/track2view

AI.tldr: Track2View提出了一种基于3D点轨迹的视频视角重渲染方法，通过显式的时空对应关系，在视频质量、视角同步和相机精度上达到SOTA，旋转误差降低30-65%，平移误差降低61-72%。
AI.motivation: 现有视频视角重渲染方法依赖每帧姿态嵌入、噪声点云渲染或隐式学习对应关系，缺乏源像素与目标像素之间显式且时间连续的链接，导致在动态场景和任意相机轨迹下表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出Track2View，核心是双视角轨迹调节器（dual-view track conditioner），通过无参数的几何操作和学习到的时间聚合，将源视角的视觉上下文传递到目标视角。同时引入数据筛选流程，通过在多相机视图对上进行3D点追踪来提取一对一的轨迹对应关系。
AI.result: 在包含400个视频的基准测试上（涵盖静态和动态场景），Track2View在视觉质量、视角同步和相机精度方面均达到SOTA，旋转误差降低30-65%，平移误差降低61-72%。
AI.conclusion: 显式的3D点轨迹作为条件能够有效提高视频视角重渲染的时空一致性和准确性，且对任意相机轨迹具有良好的泛化能力。

title: IBAD: Interpretable Behavioral Anomaly Detection on Human Mobility Data
summary: Human mobility appears highly diverse, yet much of a person's daily mobility can be explained by a small set of recurring behavioral templates, such as commuting, school-centered activities, caregiving, nightlife, or errand patterns. We present \texttt{IBAD} (\underline{I}nterpretable \underline{B}ehavioral \underline{A}nomaly \underline{D}etection), a framework that learns interpretable daily mobility templates and represents each individual as a distribution over mixtures of these templates. Rather than focusing on specific locations, IBAD characterizes activities that individuals perform across locations. This approach first discovers global behavioral templates using Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA), then employs a hierarchical self-supervised model to learn normal behavior of individuals from their soft behavioral templates. We also introduce a \emph{splicing benchmark} that creates controlled behavioral mismatches between an individual's historical profile and injected mobility patterns. Experiments on real-world and synthetic datasets show that daily behavior can be effectively decomposed into a small number of interpretable templates. Crucially, we show that the learned behavioral archetypes \emph{transfer} across distinct geographic and demographic contexts. Furthermore, IBAD maintains a robust competitive performance across all settings. For reproducibility purposes, the code is accessible at ~\href{https://github.com/USC-InfoLab/IBAD}{https://github.com/USC-InfoLab/IBAD}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IBAD框架，通过学习可解释的日常行为模板（如通勤、上学、夜生活等），将个体移动性分解为少量模板的混合分布，实现异常检测。该方法在真实和合成数据集上表现良好，且行为模板具有跨地理和人口背景的迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 人类日常移动行为看似多样，但实际可被少数重复性行为模板（如通勤、上学、照看、夜生活、办事等）解释。现有方法缺乏对这类行为模板的可解释学习与异常检测，且难以跨地域迁移。
AI.method: IBAD框架包含两步：首先利用潜在狄利克雷分配（LDA）从全局数据中学习可解释的日常行为模板；然后通过层级自监督模型，基于个体的软行为模板分布学习其正常行为模式。同时提出了splicing benchmark用于构造受控行为异常。
AI.result: 实验表明，日常行为可被有效分解为少量可解释模板；所学行为模板可跨不同地理和人口背景迁移；IBAD在所有设置下均保持稳健且有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: IBAD框架能够有效学习可解释的日常移动行为模板，实现个体的异常检测，且具备良好的跨域迁移能力，代码已开源。

title: AgentFairBench: Do LLM Agents Discriminate When They Act?
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly take actions (screening applicants, recommending credit, triaging patients), yet fairness for LLMs is still measured by grading answers. We introduce AgentFairBench, a cheap, reproducible, multi-domain benchmark for demographic disparity in the actions of LLM agents. Grounded in a companion framework, the Bias Conduction Framework (BCF, restated here), it spans three regulator-anchored domains: hiring, lending, and medical triage. Synthetic, demographic-neutral profiles are evaluated in counterfactual matched sets that vary only a name-coded race x gender signal (in the Bertrand Mullainathan tradition), under four agent scaffolds of increasing agency (direct, chain-of-thought, multi-agent deliberation, tool-augmented). A NumPy-only harness computes counterfactual flip rate, mean absolute score difference (MASD), action-rate disparity, and tool-invocation disparity, with bootstrap confidence intervals, paired tests, and false-discovery-rate control, for single-digit dollars per model. A live leaderboard with a held-out private split and a contamination canary admits external models by submission. Our pilot (864 decisions plus a test-retest replication) carries a methodological lesson: comparing a six-group score spread against a two-run noise difference overstates disparity by ~ 2.4X through statistic arity alone. Against an arity matched noise floor and an omnibus group test, claude haiku 4 5 shows no demographic effect above sampling noise (0 of 120 pairwise and 0 of 9 omnibus contrasts survive correction); a planted-bias test confirms the instrument detects disparity when present. The contribution is a sound, sensitive, adoption-ready instrument, the arity matched null methodology, and open artifacts to scale it. Code, data, and harness are released under open licenses, with an anonymized review artifact.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgentFairBench，一个用于评估LLM智能体在招聘、贷款、医疗分诊等实际决策中的人口统计学公平性的基准。通过对单一名称编码的种族×性别信号进行反事实匹配，并结合四种智能体框架（直接、思维链、多智能体协商、工具增强）进行测试。关键方法论贡献在于揭示了统计维度（arity）不匹配会导致公平性评估偏差约2.4倍，并提出arity匹配的噪声基线方法。实验表明，Claude Haiku 4.5在零假设下无显著统计差异，而植入偏差测试确认工具能检测到真实偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM公平性研究主要关注问答层面的偏差，而非LLM智能体在实际决策（如筛选申请者、推荐信贷、分诊患者）中的行为公平性。需要一个廉价、可复现、多领域的基准来评估LLM智能体在不同决策场景下的人口统计学偏差。
AI.method: 构建AgentFairBench基准，覆盖招聘、贷款、医疗分诊三个领域。使用合成人口统计学中性档案，仅通过姓名编码种族×性别信号，在四种智能体框架下进行反事实匹配评估。采用NumPy计算引擎，衡量反事实翻转率、平均绝对分数差异（MASD）、动作率差异和工具调用差异，并引入arity匹配的噪声基线和统计显著性检验。
AI.result: 比较六组分数分布与两轮噪声差异，会因统计维度不匹配而高估约2.4倍偏差。在arity匹配的噪声基线和整体组检验下，Claude Haiku 4.5在0/120配对检验和0/9整体对比中均无显著统计差异；植入偏差测试确认工具能够检测到真实存在的偏差。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种合理、灵敏、可直接使用的公平性评估工具，以及arity匹配的零假设方法论，并开源了代码、数据和评估框架，为LLM智能体公平性评估提供了可扩展的基础设施。

title: EcoBin: A Two-Stage Deep Convolutional Neural Network for Contamination-Aware Waste Classification
summary: Waste classification models have become highly accurate at sorting waste, often exceeding 95% on benchmark datasets. However, these models fail to account for contamination in recyclable waste. We present EcoBin, a two-stage deep convolutional neural network that classifies household waste by its disposal pathway and that explicitly accounts for contamination. The first stage is a base waste classifier built on an EfficientNetV2-S backbone that assigns each of the thirty waste categories in our dataset to one of four disposal pathways. The second stage is a contamination classifier that inspects any item routed toward recycling and overrides the decision to garbage when contamination is detected. Because no public dataset of contaminated recyclables exists, we synthesize one by segmenting images of clean recyclable objects with a U2-Net model and compositing realistic contamination textures onto their surfaces. The first stage achieves 87.42% test accuracy and a 96.13% pathway-adjusted accuracy. Meanwhile, the contamination stage distinguishes clean from contaminated items with a 0.99 ROC-AUC. On a test set of contaminated recyclables, the complete pipeline routes 24 of 25 items correctly, compared with only 1 of 25 for the base classifier alone. A McNemar's test confirms that the improvement contributed by the contamination stage is statistically significant (p < 0.001).

AI.tldr: EcoBin是一个两阶段深度卷积神经网络，通过显式检测污染来改进垃圾分类：第一阶段将物品分类到处理路径，第二阶段检查回收物是否被污染，并在检测到污染时将其改道至垃圾处理。通过合成污染数据集，该方法将受污染回收物的正确分类率从4%（基础模型）提升到96%。
AI.motivation: 现有垃圾分类模型在基准数据集上准确率超过95%，但忽略了回收物中的污染问题，导致实际应用中分类效果不佳。
AI.method: 基于EfficientNetV2-S的两阶段深度卷积神经网络：第一阶段进行30类废物分类并映射到4种处理路径；第二阶段用U2-Net合成污染数据，训练污染检测器来覆盖回收决策。
AI.result: 第一阶段测试准确率87.42%，路径调整准确率96.13%；污染检测ROC-AUC为0.99；完整管线在受污染回收物测试集上正确率96%（24/25），基础模型仅4%（1/25），McNemar检验p<0.001。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模污染能显著提升垃圾分类在实际场景中的有效性，合成数据方法有效缓解了污染数据稀缺问题。

title: The Information-Theoretic Benefit of Shared Representations under Orthogonality Constraints
summary: Modern deep learning architectures are increasingly multi-task and multi-modal, using a pretrained foundation model combined with task-specific, fine-tuned models. Empirically, exploiting similarity across different problems, instead of solving them individually, can significantly improve overall performance. While the generalization and sample complexity properties of multitask learning have been widely studied, the parametric complexity of joint approximation in comparison to separate approximation remains less well understood. The question is particularly relevant in modern deep learning, where models are increasingly required to satisfy structural constraints such as equivariance, conservation laws, or orthogonality. We prove lower and upper bounds on the description-length for separate and joint approximation classes, respectively, in uniform norm. We build a class of orthogonal functions by composing a shared hard feature, realized by a Rademacher-Haar wavelet series, with Sawtooth-Walsh readouts to enforce orthogonality of output coordinates. The dyadic tree structure of the Rademacher-Haar wavelet concentrates the approximation hardness in the common feature component, while the readouts act as task-specific heads. Using an information-theoretic framework, we obtain a sharp gap between the optimal approximation rates achievable by joint and separate coding. Finally, we realize this separation in a neural network model using Heaviside activations via reduction to triangle-wave approximation. Our results show that even under an orthogonality constraint joint approximation requires strictly fewer bits in compositional architectures, provided the tasks share a latent hard feature. This provides theoretical insight into the description-length-efficiency of compositional multi-output architectures and clarifies how neural networks can retain expressivity under geometric constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了在多任务学习中，联合近似相比单独近似在描述长度上具有严格优势，即使存在正交性约束。通过构建Rademacher-Haar小波与Sawtooth-Walsh读出层的组合架构，证明了共享潜在硬特征时联合编码所需比特数严格更少。
AI.motivation: 尽管多任务学习的泛化性质已被广泛研究，但联合近似与单独近似之间的参数复杂度差异仍不清晰，尤其是在现代深度学习模型需要满足等变性、守恒律或正交性等结构约束的背景下。
AI.method: 构建由共享Rademacher-Haar小波级数（硬特征）与Sawtooth-Walsh读出层（任务特定头）组成的正交函数类，利用信息论框架推导联合编码与单独编码的最优近似率，并通过Heaviside激活的神经网络实现三角波近似来体现这一分离。
AI.result: 在正交性约束下，只要任务共享潜在硬特征，联合近似所需描述长度严格少于单独近似，存在显著的近似率差距。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为组合式多输出架构的描述长度效率提供了理论依据，阐明了神经网络在几何约束下如何保持表达能力。

title: A First-Principles Derivation of LLM Policy Optimization: From Expected Reward to GRPO and Its Structural Extensions
summary: Policy gradient algorithms for language models optimize the same objective $J(θ) = \mathbb{E}*{τ\sim p*θ(τ)}[R(τ)]$, which has exactly two factors: the trajectory probability $p_θ(τ)$ and the reward $R(τ)$. Every method from REINFORCE to PPO to GRPO and their descendants modifies one or both factors to address a specific failure in the preceding formulation. Existing surveys organize these methods by domain or chronology, which obscures the rationale behind each design choice and the precise location of its intervention within the gradient estimator. This survey revisits the landscape of LLM policy optimization from $J(θ)$ on first principles and uses the trajectory side, induced by $p_θ(τ)$, and the reward side, induced by $R(τ)$, as the two axes along which methods are located. It covers the path from REINFORCE and PPO to GRPO, as well as post-GRPO variants, Agentic RL, and GRPO-OPD. The resulting framework is unified, diagnostic, and extensible: it analyzes methods from a shared objective, identifies which side each method modifies and why, and applies the same trajectory and reward axes across these settings. Across these settings, the framework also exposes compound failures that no single-side fix resolves and that therefore require joint design of the trajectory side and the reward side. The boundary cases and coupled failures identified by this map mark where existing solutions run out and provide a principled starting point for designing the next generation of LLM policy optimization algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文从$J(θ)$出发，以轨迹侧（$p_θ(τ)$）和奖励侧（$R(τ)$）两个维度统一梳理了从REINFORCE到PPO、GRPO及后续变体的LLM策略优化方法，揭示各方法的设计动机与干预位置，并指出单侧修复无法解决的复合失效问题，为下一代算法设计提供基础框架。
AI.motivation: 现有综述按领域或时间线组织方法，掩盖了每种设计选择的动机及其在梯度估计器中的具体干预位置，导致难以理解方法演进的逻辑。
AI.method: 以目标函数$J(θ)=\mathbb{E}_{τ\sim p_θ(τ)}[R(τ)]$中的轨迹概率$p_θ(τ)$和奖励$R(τ)$作为两个坐标轴，将各类策略优化方法映射到这一二维框架中，统一分析每个方法修改了哪一侧以及为何修改。
AI.result: 该框架统一、可诊断且可扩展：能从共享目标出发分析方法，识别各方法的修改侧与动机，并暴露单侧修复无法解决的复合失效问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供的边界情况和耦合失效地图指出了现有解决方案的不足，为设计下一代LLM策略优化算法提供了原则性的起点。

title: RaLMPH: Reliability-aware Learning for Multi-Pathologist Harmonization in Whole-Slide Image Classification
summary: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) is a standard paradigm for Whole-Slide Image (WSI) analysis and has achieved strong results in computational pathology. However, most MIL pipelines assume a single "gold" label per slide, which conflicts with clinical practice where substantial inter-pathologist variability is common. Existing multi-annotator learning and label-refinement methods typically estimate global annotator reliability or rely on single-instance assumptions, making them poorly suited to MIL and to localized diagnostic contexts where experts disagree. We propose RaLMPH (Reliability-aware Learning for Multi-Pathologist Harmonization), a MIL-based label reconciliation framework for WSIs annotated by multiple pathologists. RaLMPH introduces a reliability field that jointly models (i) local neighborhood structure in WSI feature space and (ii) expert uncertainty (entropy), enabling per-sample identification of trustworthy reference neighborhoods. Leveraging this field, RaLMPH performs sample-wise local annotator ranking to select reliable opinions per slide and applies an adaptive gating mechanism to fuse labels conditioned on local reliability. Experiments on a clinical WSI dataset with labels from six pathologists, as well as controlled simulated benchmarks, show that RaLMPH consistently outperforms existing approaches. Further analyses clarify how our reliability-aware mechanism improves label reconciliation and downstream MIL performance.

AI.tldr: 提出RaLMPH框架，通过可靠性场建模局部邻域结构和专家不确定度，解决多病理学家标注不一致问题，在WSI分析中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有MIL方法假设每张切片只有一个"金标准"标签，但实际临床中不同病理学家之间存在显著标注差异，而现有方法要么估计全局标注者可靠性，要么基于单实例假设，不适用于MIL和局部诊断场景。
AI.method: 提出RaLMPH框架：1) 构建可靠性场，联合建模WSI特征空间的局部邻域结构和专家不确定度（熵）；2) 基于可靠性场进行逐样本局部标注者排序，筛选可靠意见；3) 采用自适应门控机制，根据局部可靠性融合标签。
AI.result: 在包含6位病理学家标注的临床WSI数据集和受控模拟基准上，RaLMPH一致优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 可靠性感知机制有效改善了标签协调和下游MIL性能。

title: Inference-Time Decision Calibration for Temporal Classification
summary: Temporal classification errors are often treated as representation failures, but they can also arise from how available evidence is converted into decisions. This paper proposes a representation--calibration decomposition for temporal classification. We keep a trained native classifier frozen and separate two inference-time interventions: a conservative residual multi-scale branch that adds auxiliary logits to the native prediction, and a post-hoc branch-aware calibrator that recombines native and residual evidence at decision time. This design distinguishes missing temporal evidence from underused decision-level evidence without retraining the backbone. Across FI-2010, PTB-XL, UCI-HAR, MHEALTH, and HARTH, we find that gains are strongly regime-dependent. Residual multi-scale evidence is most useful in noisy or representation-limited settings, especially short-horizon FI-2010 and weaker recurrent backbones, while branch-aware calibration helps when native and auxiliary logits contain complementary evidence not fully exploited by the raw decision rule. Near-saturated settings show limited gains from either intervention. These results suggest that temporal classification should be understood not only as representation learning, but also as the problem of trusting, combining, and calibrating evidence from multiple views.

AI.tldr: 本文提出时间分类的表征-校准分解方法，通过冻结预训练模型，引入残差多尺度分支和事后校准器两种推理时干预手段，区分缺失的时间证据与未被充分利用的决策层证据，实验表明不同场景下两种干预的效果存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 时间分类错误通常被视为表征学习不足，但作者认为错误也可能源于证据转化为决策的过程。现有方法多集中于改进表征，忽略了决策层面的校准问题。
AI.method: 1) 冻结预训练的时间分类器；2) 引入保守残差多尺度分支，为原生预测补充辅助logits；3) 引入事后分支感知校准器，在决策阶段重新组合原生证据和残差证据。
AI.result: 在FI-2010、PTB-XL等5个数据集上实验发现：残差分支在噪声大或表征受限场景（如短时域FI-2010、弱循环骨干网络）效果显著；分支校准在原生与辅助logits含互补证据时发挥作用；接近饱和的设置下两种干预提升有限。
AI.conclusion: 时间分类不应仅被视为表征学习问题，还需关注如何信任、组合和校准来自多视角的证据，即推理时的决策过程同样关键。

title: Skill-to-LoRA: From Using Skills to Learning Behaviors for Token-Efficient LLM Agents
summary: Agent skills are commonly distributed as SKILL.md files: human-readable procedural documents that describe workflows, tools, resources, and domain conventions. While convenient for inspection and reuse, this design requires the same reusable procedure to be repeatedly injected into the runtime context. We propose Skill-to-LoRA(S2L), a behavior-centric skill representation that replaces runtime skill text with skill-specific LoRA adapters. Rather than compressing the skill document itself, S2L models the behavioral change induced by the skill text: offline, the complete SKILL.md is used to synthesize skill-guided demonstrations; online, the full document is omitted and the corresponding LoRA adapter is dynamically loaded to activate the learned skill behavior. We evaluate S2L with Qwen3.6-27B on a 21-skill subset of SWE-Skills-Bench. Compared with the no-skill and Full Skill Text baselines, S2L improves pass rate by 2.9 and 5.2 percentage points, respectively, while reducing per-step token cost by 6.6% relative to Full Skill Text prompting. S2L matches or improves Full Skill Text on 18/21 skills and the no-skill baseline on 15/21 skills. Control experiments further show that the gains depend on skill-specific adapter alignment: Wrong-LoRA and Shared-LoRA both reduce performance. These results suggest that many procedural agent skills can be converted from runtime instructions into trainable, dynamically loadable behavioral modules. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Skill-to-LoRA (S2L)，将智能体的技能从运行时文本指令转换为可训练的LoRA适配器，在提升任务通过率的同时降低推理成本。
AI.motivation: 传统SKILL.md方式需要在每次运行时重复注入完整的技能文档，导致token消耗高；本文希望将技能从运行时文本转换为可动态加载的行为模块。
AI.method: 离线阶段利用完整SKILL.md合成技能引导的演示数据，训练技能特定的LoRA适配器；在线阶段不再使用完整文档，而是动态加载对应LoRA适配器来激活习得的技能行为。
AI.result: 在SWE-Skills-Bench的21个技能子集上，相比无技能和完整技能文本基线，通过率分别提升2.9和5.2个百分点，每步token成本相比完整技能文本降低6.6%；在18/21个技能上匹配或超越完整技能文本，在15/21个技能上匹配或超越无技能基线。
AI.conclusion: 许多过程性智能体技能可以从运行时指令转化为可训练、可动态加载的行为模块，且技能特定的适配器对齐是关键。

title: An Extensive Benchmark for Single-round and Multi-round Instruction-based Image Editing
comment: Accepted by International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV), 2026
summary: In recent years, there have been notable advancements in the area of instruction-based image editing (IIE), which focuses on the automatic alteration of input images using a model. Nevertheless, assessing the effectiveness of these editing models poses a considerable challenge due to the intricate nature of instructions and the wide variety of edits. To tackle this problem, one urgent task in this domain is the development of a robust evaluation framework that can precisely gauge the quality of editing outcomes and offer valuable benchmarks to guide future improvements. To address this challenge, we present a comprehensive evaluation benchmark named I2EBench2.0, designed for single-round and multi-round assessment of IIE models. I2EBench2.0 has four key features: 1) Evaluation Across Single and Multi-rounds: I2EBench2.0 simultaneously evaluates both single-round and multi-round instruction-based edits, assessing the precision and consistency of the edits. 2) Extensive Evaluation Criteria: I2EBench2.0 encompasses a broad range of criteria, evaluating both high-level and low-level aspects of each IIE model. Specifically, it incorporates 16 dimensions for single-round evaluations and 7 for multi-round evaluations. 3) Alignment with Human Judgment: To ensure our benchmark aligns with human evaluation, we conducted a comprehensive user study for each criterion. 4) Research-driven Insights: By analyzing the strengths and weaknesses of current IIE models across all 16 single-round and 7 multi-round dimensions, we provide critical insights aimed at directing future research in this area. We tested eight recently developed IIE models using I2EBench2.0 and derived academic insights through meticulous comparison and analysis. The related code, dataset, and images generated by all IIE models are available on GitHub: https://github.com/cocoshe/I2EBench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为I2EBench2.0的综合评估基准，用于单轮和多轮指令式图像编辑（IIE）模型的性能评估，包含16个单轮和7个多轮评估维度，并通过人工用户研究确保与人类判断对齐，为IIE领域提供了系统的评估框架和研究方向指引。
AI.motivation: 指令式图像编辑（IIE）模型近年来取得了显著进展，但由于指令的复杂性和编辑类型的多样性，现有评估方法难以精准衡量模型效果，亟需一个鲁棒且全面的评估框架来指导模型改进。
AI.method: I2EBench2.0从四个关键方面构建：1）同时支持单轮和多轮评估，兼顾编辑精度与一致性；2）涵盖16个单轮维度和7个多轮维度的多层次评价标准；3）通过用户研究确保评估结果与人类判断对齐；4）基于模型强弱项分析提供研究驱动的洞察。
AI.result: 使用I2EBench2.0对8个最新的IIE模型进行了测试，通过细致的比较分析得出了学术洞察，并公开了代码、数据集和所有模型生成的图像。
AI.conclusion: I2EBench2.0为IIE模型提供了全面、可复现的评估基准，揭示了现有模型的优势与不足，并为该领域的未来研究指明了方向。

title: Circuit Tracing in Autoregressive Protein Language Models
comment: Accepted into the Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop at ICML 2026. 24 pages, 14 figures
summary: Protein language models (pLMs) can generate novel protein sequences with properties beyond those observed in nature, yet the mechanisms underlying protein generation remain poorly understood. Existing mechanistic interpretability methods based on sparse autoencoders and transcoders primarily focus on protein representation learning models and do not capture the computation required for autoregressive generation. Here, we introduce ProGenMech, a mechanistic interpretability framework for generative protein language models that extends cross-layer transcoders (CLTs) to ProGen3, a sparse Mixture-of-Experts model trained for both causal generation and span infilling. Unlike per-layer approaches, CLTs reconstruct each layer using sparse latent variables from all preceding layers, enabling faithful recovery of inter-layer generative computation. We further develop a zero-shot circuit discovery framework to identify sparse latent circuits responsible for protein generation and fitness prediction. In causal generation and zero-shot fitness estimation tasks, ProGenMech outperforms local transcoder baselines in recovering ProGen3's probability distribution and functional scoring behavior, while matching the original model's generative distribution in span infilling tasks. Moreover, the recovered circuits reveal biologically meaningful motifs and functional regions associated with conserved sequence patterns and protein fitness landscapes, establishing a foundation for interpretable and steerable protein generation.

AI.tldr: 提出了ProGenMech机制可解释性框架，通过跨层Transcoder（CLTs）分析生成式蛋白质语言模型ProGen3的内部计算机制，并成功发现与蛋白质功能和适应性相关的稀疏潜在回路。
AI.motivation: 现有机制可解释性方法（如稀疏自编码器、Transcoder）主要聚焦于蛋白质表示学习模型，无法捕获自回归生成过程所需的计算机制，因此需要针对生成式蛋白质语言模型的解释性框架。
AI.method: 将跨层Transcoder（CLTs）扩展到ProGen3（稀疏MoE模型），通过从所有前层重建每一层来恢复层间生成计算；并开发了零样本回路发现框架来识别负责蛋白质生成和适应性预测的稀疏潜在回路。
AI.result: 在因果生成和零样本适应性估计任务中，ProGenMech在恢复ProGen3的概率分布和功能评分行为上优于局部Transcoder基线，并在跨度填充任务中匹配原始模型的生成分布。发现的回路揭示了与保守序列模式和蛋白质适应性景观相关的生物意义基序和功能区域。
AI.conclusion: ProGenMech为可解释和可引导的蛋白质生成建立了基础，实现了对生成式蛋白质语言模型内部工作机制的深入理解。

title: OpenClaw-Skill: Collective Skill Tree Search for Agentic Large Language Models
summary: Equipping Large Language Model (LLM) agents with effective skills is crucial for solving complex tasks in real-world systems like OpenClaw. In this work, we aim to develop a framework that automatically constructs such reusable skills to enhance LLMs in tool use, multi-step reasoning, and dynamic environment interaction. To this end, we propose Collective Skill Tree Search (CSTS), a novel tree-search-based skill construction framework that constructs structured, diverse and generalizable tree of skills. The core idea of CSTS is to leverage collective intelligence to jointly search, identify and compose effective skills via two iterative phases: Collective Skill Node Generation (CSN-Gen) and Collective Skill Node Assessment (CSN-Assess). CSN-Gen exploits collective knowledge from multiple models to explore diverse candidate skills for each subtask, enabling comprehensive skill exploration. CSN-Assess employs multiple models as judges to evaluate and select skill nodes with two scoring mechanisms: (1) collective quality scoring that aggregates independent evaluations to produce a robust estimate of skill effectiveness, and (2) collective transferability scoring that explicitly verifies whether a skill generalizes well across different models. With CSTS, we construct a set of comprehensive tree of skills along with skill-augmented training data, enabling models to effectively learn and utilize skills. Besides, we introduce Collective Skill Reinforcement Learning, which actively selects multiple relevant skills from the tree to broaden solution-space exploration, avoid being trapped by a single skill and its resulting homogeneous or suboptimal solutions. As a result, our trained model, OpenClaw-Skill, exhibits outstanding agentic capabilities in long-horizon planning, tool use and generalization over challenging benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出集体技能树搜索（CSTS）框架，通过集体智能自动构建可复用的技能树，增强LLM代理在工具使用、多步推理和动态环境交互中的能力。CSTS包含集体技能节点生成（CSN-Gen）和评估（CSN-Assess）两个迭代阶段，并引入集体技能强化学习（CSRL）以拓宽解决方案空间。最终模型OpenClaw-Skill在长程规划、工具使用和泛化方面表现出色。
AI.motivation: 为LLM代理装备有效技能对于解决复杂任务至关重要，现有方法在技能的可复用性、多样性和泛化性方面存在不足，亟需一种能自动构建结构化、多样化且可泛化技能框架的方法。
AI.method: 提出CSTS框架，包含两个迭代阶段：CSN-Gen利用多个模型的集体知识探索多样候选技能；CSN-Assess采用集体质量评分和集体可迁移性评分两种机制评估筛选技能节点。此外引入CSRL，从技能树中主动选择多个相关技能以拓宽解空间探索。
AI.result: 训练得到的OpenClaw-Skill模型在长程规划、工具使用和泛化等挑战性基准测试中展现出卓越的代理能力。
AI.conclusion: CSTS框架能有效构建可复用的技能树，显著提升LLM代理在复杂任务中的表现，验证了利用集体智能进行技能构建和强化学习的有效性。

title: Toward the Whole Picture: Accumulative Fingerprint Mapping and Reconstruction for Small-Area Mobile Sensors
summary: Small-area fingerprint sensing on mobile devices creates a fundamental mismatch between acquisition and recognition: each touch captures only a tiny, pose-varying local patch, while reliable biometric matching ultimately requires a stable and sufficiently complete fingerprint representation. Existing pipelines largely cope with this mismatch by treating repeated touches as independent partial templates, which leads to repeated registration, repeated matching, and no guarantee of adequate global coverage. In this paper, we advocate a different formulation, namely \emph{accumulative fingerprint mapping and reconstruction} for small-area mobile sensing. Rather than matching every partial patch separately, the proposed perspective converts a sequence of local observations into a unified fingerprint state that is progressively refined as new touches arrive and can be matched only once after consolidation. As a concrete baseline, we present a classical pipeline that performs patch-wise structural feature extraction, feature-level registration and fusion, fingerprint map construction, and phase-based ridge reconstruction. More importantly, we position this baseline within a broader mobile fingerprint framework that integrates structured token learning, two-stage pose reasoning, and diffusion-based generative reconstruction. This viewpoint reframes mobile fingerprint recognition from multi-capture multi-match processing to accumulative map building, state refinement, and one-shot matching, offering a principled route toward efficient, pose-robust, and deployment-friendly biometrics for small-area mobile platforms. The baseline implementation has been publicly released at https://github.com/XiongjunGuan/FpReconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向小面积移动指纹传感的累积映射与重建方法，将多次局部触摸整合为统一指纹状态，实现单次匹配而非多次独立匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有小面积指纹识别将每次触摸视为独立局部模板，导致重复注册、重复匹配，且无法保证全局覆盖的充分性，存在采集与识别之间的根本性不匹配。
AI.method: 提出累积指纹映射与重建的视角，包含：局部结构特征提取、特征级配准与融合、指纹图构建、相位脊线重建；并融入结构化令牌学习、两阶段姿态推理和扩散生成重建的框架。
AI.result: 将多捕获多匹配的处理方式转变为累积地图构建、状态精化与一次性匹配，实现了高效、姿态鲁棒且易于部署的小面积移动平台生物识别。
AI.conclusion: 该累积映射视角为小面积移动指纹识别提供了一种原理性路线，从重复匹配转向单次匹配，显著提升了效率与实用性。

title: Active Learning with Low-Rank Structure for Data Selection
summary:
In the data selection problem, the objective is to choose a small, representative subset of data that can be used to efficiently train a machine learning model. Sener and Savarese [ICLR 2018] showed that, given an embedding representation of the data and suitable geometric assumptions, heuristics based on $k$-center clustering can be used to perform data selection. This perspective was further explored by Axiotis et. al. [ICML 2024], who proposed a data selection approach based on $k$-means clustering and sensitivity sampling. However, these methods rely on the assumption that the dataset exhibits intrinsic geometric structure that can be effectively captured by clustering, whereas many modern datasets instead possess global algebraic structure that is better exploited by low-rank approximation or principal component analysis.
  In this paper, we introduce a new data selection framework based on low-rank approximation and residual-based sampling, formulated through the lens of row subset selection and loss-preserving coreset construction. Given an embedding representation of the data satisfying mild regularity conditions, which can be interpreted as algebraic or angular notions of Lipschitz continuity, we show that it is possible to select a weighted subset of $\tilde{O}\left(k + \frac{1}{\varepsilon^2}\right)$ data points whose average loss approximates the average loss over the full dataset within a $(1+\varepsilon)$ relative error, up to an additive $\varepsilon Φ_k$ term, where $Φ_k$ denotes the optimal rank-$k$ approximation cost of the embedding matrix. We complement these theoretical guarantees with empirical evaluations, demonstrating that on a range of real-world datasets, our data selection approach achieves improved performance over prior strategies based on uniform sampling or clustering-based sensitivity sampling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于低秩近似和残差采样的数据选择框架，从行子集选择和保损核心集构建的角度出发，能够在满足正则性条件的嵌入表示下，选择约Õ(k + 1/ε²)个加权数据点，使得平均损失达到(1+ε)的相对误差，并在多个真实数据集上优于均匀采样和基于聚类的敏感性采样方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于聚类（如k中心、k均值）的数据选择方法假设数据具有内在的几何结构，但许多现代数据集具有全局代数结构，更适合通过低秩近似或主成分分析来利用，因此需要一种新的数据选择框架。
AI.method: 基于低秩近似和残差采样的数据选择框架，从行子集选择和保损核心集构建的角度出发，利用嵌入表示的代数/角度Lipschitz连续性正则条件，通过加权子集选择来实现近似损失保真。
AI.result: 理论上，可以选择约Õ(k + 1/ε²)个加权数据点，使得平均损失在全数据集上的平均损失达到(1+ε)相对误差（加上εΦ_k的加性项，其中Φ_k是最优秩k近似代价）。实验上，在多个真实数据集上优于均匀采样和基于聚类的敏感性采样方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于低秩近似和残差采样的数据选择框架是一种有效的新方法，特别适用于具有全局代数结构的数据集，理论保证和实验效果均优于现有基于聚类的方法。

title: LabOSBench: Benchmarking Computer Use Agents for Scientific Instrument Control
summary: Current computer-use benchmarks primarily focus on software operation tasks in virtualized systems, whereas scientific instrumentation scenarios require coordinated control over complex interfaces, and feedback-driven parameter adjustment. However, directly evaluating agents on physical high-precision instruments is impractical due to high cost, safety risks, limited accessibility, and difficulty in ensuring reproducible evaluation. This motivates the need for a simulated yet realistic testbed that preserves the operational challenges of scientific instruments while enabling scalable and safe benchmarking. To this end, we introduce LabOSBench, a challenging benchmark for multimodal GUI agents built on a suite of web-based scientific-instrument simulators. Operating directly via a browser, LabOSBench avoids resource-heavy OS virtualization while supporting flexible task configuration and execution-based evaluation. Specifically, LabOSBench constructs 96 subtasks across eight instrument simulators, covering workflows from sample loading, alignment, parameter tuning, and data acquisition to result inspection. We evaluate general-purpose vision-language models, specialized GUI agent models, and advanced agentic frameworks at both subtask and end-to-end levels. Our experiments reveal that while existing agents can complete many structured GUI subtasks, they still struggle with feedback-driven operations and long-horizon workflow execution. Overall, LabOSBench provides a reproducible, low-cost testbed for advancing computer-using agents toward scientific-instrument control.

AI.tldr: LabOSBench是一个基于Web科学仪器模拟器的多模态GUI代理基准测试平台，提供了96个子任务和8个仪器模拟器，用于评估代理在科学仪器控制中的表现。实验发现现有代理能完成结构化GUI子任务，但在反馈驱动操作和长周期工作流执行上仍有困难。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机使用基准测试主要关注虚拟化系统中的软件操作任务，而科学仪器场景需要复杂的界面协调控制和反馈驱动的参数调整。直接在物理高精度仪器上评估代理成本高、存在安全风险、可访问性有限且难以保证可重复评估，因此需要创建一个模拟但逼真的测试平台。
AI.method: 构建了基于Web的科学仪器模拟器套件LabOSBench，通过浏览器直接操作，避免资源密集型的OS虚拟化。包含8个仪器模拟器、96个子任务，覆盖样品加载、对准、参数调优、数据采集和结果检查等完整工作流程。支持灵活的任务配置和基于执行结果的评估。
AI.result: 在子任务和端到端两个层面评估了通用视觉语言模型、专用GUI代理模型和高级代理框架。实验表明现有代理能完成许多结构化GUI子任务，但在反馈驱动操作和长周期工作流执行方面仍存在困难。
AI.conclusion: LabOSBench为计算机使用代理提供了可重复、低成本的测试平台，有助于推动代理向科学仪器控制方向发展。

title: Unlocking Diffusion Hierarchies: Adaptive Timestep Selection for Zero-Shot Segmentation
summary: Zero-shot segmentation has recently shown notable improvement by leveraging the rich visual priors in large-scale text-to-image diffusion models, such as Stable Diffusion. However, current diffusion-based methods often face limitations due to the trade-off between spatial resolution and contextual information, as well as their reliance on a single static timestep for feature extraction. To overcome these challenges, our work introduces two key advancements. First, our Contextual Similarity Maps fuse high-resolution attention maps with rich U-Net encoder features, providing both fine-grained and robust per-pixel representations. Second, we identify an emergent hierarchical semantic progression within the denoising process of various diffusion models: representations transition from part-level abstractions at earlier timesteps to object-level abstractions at later stages. Leveraging this insight, we introduce a mechanism to adaptively select the optimal timestep for each pixel. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing zero-shot segmentation baselines, validating the efficacy of combining contextual features with dynamic, hierarchical timestep selection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的零样本分割方法，通过融合上下文相似性图和自适应时间步选择机制，在保持高分辨率的同时提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型方法在零样本分割中面临空间分辨率与上下文信息的权衡问题，且依赖单一静态时间步提取特征，限制了分割效果。
AI.method: 1) 提出上下文相似性图，融合高分辨率注意力图与U-Net编码器特征；2) 发现扩散模型去噪过程中的层次化语义递进规律，并设计自适应时间步选择机制，为每个像素选取最优时间步。
AI.result: 在多个基准上持续超越现有零样本分割方法，验证了上下文特征与动态层次化时间步选择的联合有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合上下文特征与自适应时间步选择，有效解决了扩散模型在零样本分割中的分辨率-上下文权衡问题，显著提升了分割性能。

title: ALCL: An Adaptive Log-Correntropy Loss for Robust Learning under Non-Gaussian Noise
summary: Robust deep learning under heavy-tailed and impulsive noise remains challenging because conventional losses such as mean squared error (MSE) exhibit unbounded sensitivity to outliers. Although correntropy-based objectives improve robustness, existing formulations rely on fixed kernel parameters that must be empirically tuned and remain static during training. To address these limitations, we propose an Adaptive Log-Correntropy Loss (ALCL), a heavy-tailed loss formulation that adaptively learns its robustness geometry during optimization. ALCL introduces a logarithmic residual model whose shape and scale parameters are learned jointly with network weights through differentiable reparameterization. This yields a principled maximum likelihood formulation whose influence function is formally bounded and redescending, allowing the loss geometry to adapt dynamically to evolving residual statistics while suppressing extreme outliers. Comparative experiments on four widely used benchmark datasets spanning grayscale and red-green-blue (RGB) image data under mixed heavy-tailed and impulsive noise demonstrate that ALCL consistently outperforms MSE and optimally tuned generalized correntropy losses in both reconstruction fidelity and downstream classification accuracy. While performance differences remain small under low-noise conditions, under high-noise regimes ALCL improves median accuracy by up to 4.75% on grayscale benchmarks and 4.51% on RGB datasets, with reduced variance across runs. These results demonstrate that adaptive robustness through joint learning of loss parameters provides a computationally efficient alternative to static correntropy-based losses for deep learning in non-Gaussian environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应对数科润特罗皮损失（ALCL），通过可微重参数化联合学习损失函数的形状和尺度参数，在重尾和脉冲噪声环境下显著优于传统的均方误差和固定核参数的科润特罗皮损失。
AI.motivation: 传统损失函数（如MSE）对离群点敏感，而现有基于科润特罗皮的目标函数依赖固定核参数，需要经验调参且训练过程中保持不变，无法自适应调整鲁棒性几何结构。
AI.method: 提出ALCL，引入对数残差模型，通过可微重参数化联合学习形状和尺度参数与网络权重，构建具有有界且再下降影响函数的极大似然框架，使损失几何能动态适应残差统计特性。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集（含灰度图和RGB图）的混合重尾和脉冲噪声实验下，ALCL在重建保真度和分类准确率上均优于MSE和最优调参的广义科润特罗皮损失；高噪声条件下灰度图基准中位数准确率提升4.75%，RGB数据集提升4.51%，且方差更低。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合学习损失参数实现自适应鲁棒性，为深度学习在非高斯环境下提供了一种计算高效且优于静态科润特罗皮损失的替代方案。

title: Adaptive and Explicit safe: Triggering Latent Safety Awareness in Large Reasoning Models
summary: While Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) excel at complex tasks, they remain highly vulnerable to sophisticated jailbreaks and direct harmful queries. To address this vulnerability, prior works depend heavily on external manual data annotation for safety alignment. However, we observe that LRMs can inherently identify safety risks when being re-presented with original queries alongside their own reasoning trajectories -- a capability we term Latent Safety Awareness. To leverage this safety awareness, we first employ Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to explicitly induce safe tags to trigger safety analysis and guidance following the initial reasoning content for unsafe queries, while preserving standard responses for general queries to ensure adaptive triggering. Subsequently, we apply Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to further enhance the correctness and stability of the safety analysis and guidance. Notably, responses required for both training stages are entirely generated by models being optimized. With (Safe Trigger) SFT and DPO, experimental results demonstrate significant safety enhancement. For example, the Attack Success Rate (ASR) of DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B, on average, drops 24.65% and 36.72% on harmful and jailbreak benchmarks, respectively. Finally, our Safe Trigger method exerts almost no negative impact on general performance or user experience.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Safe Trigger方法，利用大型推理模型(LRMs)自身的潜在安全感知能力，通过SFT和DPO两阶段自训练实现安全对齐，无需外部人工标注。实验表明该方法有效降低攻击成功率，且不影响通用性能。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型虽擅长复杂任务，但极易受到越狱攻击和有害查询的侵害。现有安全对齐方法严重依赖外部人工数据标注，成本高昂且效率低下。作者观察到LRMs具备内在的安全风险识别能力（潜在安全感知），希望利用这一能力实现无需外部标注的安全对齐。
AI.method: 1) 首先通过监督微调(SFT)显式诱导安全标签，在初始推理内容后触发安全分析和引导（针对不安全查询），同时保留对一般查询的标准响应，实现自适应触发。2) 随后使用直接偏好优化(DPO)进一步增强安全分析和引导的正确性与稳定性。两个阶段的训练所需响应均由模型自身生成，无需外部标注。
AI.result: 在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B上，有害基准的攻击成功率(ASR)平均下降24.65%，越狱基准的ASR平均下降36.72%。安全性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: Safe Trigger方法能有效提升LRMs的安全性，且几乎不影响通用性能和用户体验，证明了利用模型自身潜在安全感知能力进行自训练对齐的可行性。

title: DenseControl: Instance-Level Controllable Synthesis of Dense Crowd Image
summary: In this paper, we introduce DenseControl, a novel pipeline for generating dense crowd images. Specifically, DenseControl meticulously positions and sizes each generated instance to align precisely with the predefined coordinates and scales. Based on this, we further allow for control over the background, style, and attributes of instances. The motivation behind DenseControl stems from the observation of two main challenges in synthesizing crowd images: controlling signal embedding and maintaining topological integrity when imparting instance scale guidance. To address these, we first introduce the Isolated Object Embedding (IOE) map, a novel representation that facilitates spatial location control while mitigating the difficulties associated with learning projections for model. Secondly, we propose an Implicit Scale Embedding (ISE) strategy that seamlessly integrates with the IOE map to encode precise scale information. To further enhance the efficacy of combining ISE with the IOE map, we incorporate a Position Shortcut mechanism that enhances cross-attention to alleviate projection challenges. We evaluate DenseControl through two lenses: synthesis quality and applicability in latent applications. Experiments across different control conditions demonstrate DenseControl achieves state-of-the-art results in dense crowd image synthesis. Furthermore, we showcase applications in augmenting crowd analysis under data scarcity, transfer learning, and weather generalization scenes, to highlight the practical utility of DenseControl. The codebase will be released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DenseControl，一种用于生成密集人群图像的流水线，通过IOE图和ISE策略实现精确的位置、尺寸、背景、风格和属性控制，在人群图像合成中达到SOTA，并展示了在数据增强、迁移学习和天气泛化等场景的应用价值。
AI.motivation: 观察到合成人群图像时存在两个主要挑战：控制信号嵌入困难，以及在传递实例尺度引导时难以保持拓扑完整性。
AI.method: 1) 提出隔离对象嵌入(IOE)图用于空间位置控制；2) 提出隐式尺度嵌入(ISE)策略以编码精确尺度信息；3) 引入位置快捷机制(Position Shortcut)增强交叉注意力，缓解投影学习难题。
AI.result: 在不同控制条件下，DenseControl在密集人群图像合成中达到了最先进的水平。在数据稀缺下的人群分析增强、迁移学习和天气泛化场景中展示了实用性。
AI.conclusion: DenseControl有效解决了密集人群图像合成中的空间控制和尺度保持问题，具有广泛的实际应用前景，代码将开源。

title: Beyond the Blood Draw: Explainable Machine Learning for Non-Invasive Dysglycemia Risk Screening
summary: Dysglycemia, encompassing both prediabetes and diabetes, affects huge numbers of adults worldwide, yet many of them remain undiagnosed. We developed and validated machine-learning (ML) models for non-invasive screening of dysglycemia risk that require no laboratory tests. Pooling data from the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES) 2017--2023 (n=14,352), we trained six ML models with stratified 5-fold cross-validation and compared them with two established clinical risk scores. LightGBM achieved the highest area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC=0.820, 95% CI: 0.806--0.835), outperforming the Finnish Diabetes Risk Score (0.745) and American Diabetes Association Risk Test (0.783). SHAP analysis identified age, race/ethnicity, and waist-to-height ratio as the most influential predictors. Subgroup analyses confirmed consistent performance across demographic strata (AUC: 0.735--0.832). These results demonstrate the feasibility of explainable, laboratory-free dysglycemia screening for deployment in community settings and self-tracking health applications.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用NHANES数据开发并验证了基于机器学习的非侵入性血糖异常筛查模型，LightGBM模型表现最优（AUC=0.820），优于传统临床风险评分，且无需实验室检测。
AI.motivation: 全球大量成年人存在血糖异常（包括糖尿病前期和糖尿病），但许多人未被诊断，急需简单、无创的筛查工具。
AI.method: 使用NHANES 2017-2023数据（n=14,352），训练6种ML模型（5折交叉验证），与芬兰糖尿病风险评分和美国糖尿病协会风险测试比较，并用SHAP进行可解释性分析。
AI.result: LightGBM模型AUC=0.820（95%CI: 0.806-0.835），优于传统评分（0.745和0.783）；年龄、种族/族裔和腰围身高比是最重要预测因子；各亚组AUC为0.735-0.832。
AI.conclusion: 可解释的、无需实验室的血糖异常筛查模型可行，适合社区部署和自我健康追踪应用。

title: Scaling LLM Reasoning from Minimal Labels: A Semi-Supervised Framework with a Lightweight Verifier
summary: For the development of Large language models (LLMs), recent approaches to generating pseudo intermediate reasoning have shown remarkable progress. But they typically rely on large numbers of correctly annotated answers to assess reasoning quality. This paper presents a semi-supervised framework that scales reasoning learning from minimal supervision, turning reasoning verification itself into a data creation mechanism. We train a lightweight reasoning-correctness classifier on only a few labeled samples, which judges whether intermediate reasoning traces generated by an LLM are valid. Furthermore, an entropy-based confidence threshold filters out unreliable samples, and the remaining high-confidence reasoning traces are used to fine-tune the model. Experiments on Verifiable Math Problems (Orca-Math subset) and Question Answering on Image Scene Graphs (GQA) with Visual Programming show that our method achieves accuracy comparable to using 10-15x more labeled data. Ablation analyses confirm that both the classifier and entropy filtering are essential for scalable and noise-resistant pseudo-labeling. By replacing expensive answer-level supervision with lightweight reasoning verification, our method provides a practical path toward constructing large-scale reasoning resources and paves the way for future autonomous reasoning systems that learn from minimal human input.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督框架，通过轻量级推理正确性分类器和熵置信度阈值，仅用极少标注样本就能生成高质量推理轨迹并微调LLM，在数学题和视觉问答任务上达到10-15倍标注数据的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大量正确标注的答案来评估推理质量，标注成本高昂，限制了推理学习在大语言模型中的可扩展性。
AI.method: 1) 在少量标注样本上训练轻量级推理正确性分类器；2) 用分类器判断LLM生成的推理轨迹是否有效；3) 通过基于熵的置信度阈值过滤不可靠样本；4) 用剩余高置信度推理轨迹微调模型。
AI.result: 在Orca-Math（数学题）和GQA（视觉问答）任务上，仅用少量标注数据即可达到使用10-15倍标注数据的准确率。消融实验证实分类器和熵过滤对可扩展的、抗噪声的伪标注至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 该方法用轻量级推理验证替代昂贵的答案级监督，为构建大规模推理资源提供了实用路径，并为未来从极少量人类输入中学习的自主推理系统奠定基础。

title: Fusion-E2Pulse: A Multimodal Event-RGB Fusion Network for Non-contact Pulse Wave Reconstruction
comment: Accepted by MICCAI 2026. The final version will appear in the official MICCAI proceedings published by Springer
summary: Non-contact pulse wave reconstruction hinges on the precise recovery of waveform morphology, including the dicrotic notch. Conventional Red-Green-Blue (RGB)-based methods, which extract physiological signals from recorded facial videos, are constrained by the integral imaging mechanism of standard cameras, where the exposure process induces a smoothing effect that attenuates subtle vascular pulsation details. Conversely, neuromorphic event cameras, while offering exceptional sensitivity to intensity fluctuations, are inherently susceptible to noise and artifacts induced by minor motion. To exploit the synergy between frame-based integration and event-based differential sensing, we propose a novel multimodal network named Fusion-E2Pulse. This framework utilizes filtered RGB signals as structural priors to suppress motion artifacts, while leveraging the high-sensitivity of event streams to recover fine-grained morphological details. Experimental results demonstrate that Fusion-E2Pulse achieves state-of-the-art performance, effectively balancing noise suppression and morphological fidelity, achieving a mean absolute error of 0.78 bpm for heart rate estimation, a waveform correlation of 0.89, and a systolic phase duration error of 16.74 ms, validating its efficacy in reconstructing fine-grained pathological features.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Fusion-E2Pulse的多模态融合网络，通过结合传统RGB帧信号的抗噪优势与神经形态事件相机的高灵敏度特性，实现了非接触式脉搏波的高精度重建，在心率估计、波形相关性及收缩期相位误差等指标上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB方法受限于标准相机的积分成像机制，曝光过程导致平滑效应，削弱了微细血管搏动细节；而神经形态事件相机虽对强度波动极为敏感，但易受微小运动产生的噪声和伪影干扰。两者各有局限，亟需一种融合方案取长补短。
AI.method: 提出Fusion-E2Pulse多模态网络：利用滤波后的RGB信号作为结构先验抑制运动伪影，同时利用事件流的高灵敏度恢复细粒度形态细节，实现帧基积分与事件基差分感知的协同。
AI.result: 心率估计MAE为0.78 bpm，波形相关性达0.89，收缩期相位持续时间误差为16.74 ms，在噪声抑制与形态保真度之间取得平衡，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: Fusion-E2Pulse有效验证了RGB帧信号与事件流融合在非接触脉搏波重建中的优越性，能够可靠重建包含重搏波切迹在内的细粒度病理特征。

title: Mojo: A Promising Tool for Scalable Financial AI Efficiency
summary: For thirty years, quantitative finance has paid a costly two-language tax: models researched in Python are rewritten in C++ for production, often introducing numerical discrepancies. GPU-accelerated deep learning exacerbates this problem, as nondeterministic floating-point reductions can produce drift in long backtests, challenging regulatory reproducibility and auditability expectations. This article surveys Mojo, Modular's 2026 Python-like systems language, as a structural response for capital markets engineering. While closing the Python-to-C++ performance gap, Mojo uniquely combines native interoperability with the low-level systems control required to construct bit-exact deterministic kernels. Its MLIR compilation infrastructure further allows a single codebase to target scalar, SIMD, multicore, and GPU execution, reducing the translation bottleneck between research and production. We benchmark four core financial AI workloads: Monte Carlo option pricing, LLM sentiment inference, multi-asset backtesting, and portfolio Value at Risk. On Apple Silicon, Mojo demonstrates 20x to 180x speedups over pure Python on directly measured kernels; larger-scale GPU workload results are projections calibrated from published benchmarks. Alongside transparent performance data, we introduce mojo-deterministic, an open-source library of reproducible reduction kernels, and provide a candid assessment of the problems Mojo does and does not yet solve.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了Mojo语言如何解决量化金融中Python研究原型与C++生产系统之间的"双语税"问题，通过提供类Python语法、高性能编译和确定性计算支持，在多个金融AI工作负载上实现了20-180倍加速。
AI.motivation: 量化金融长期面临Python研究模型需重写为C++生产代码的高成本问题，且GPU加速深度学习中的非确定性浮点运算导致回测漂移，挑战监管可重复性和审计期望。
AI.method: 评测Mojo语言在四种核心金融AI工作负载（蒙特卡洛期权定价、LLM情感推理、多资产回测、投资组合VaR）上的性能，并引入开源库mojo-deterministic实现可复现的确定性归约核。
AI.result: 在Apple Silicon上，Mojo相比纯Python在直接测量的核上实现20倍至180倍加速；更大规模GPU工作负载结果基于已发表基准进行校准预测。
AI.conclusion: Mojo通过MLIR编译基础设施实现单一代码库适配标量、SIMD、多核和GPU执行，有效减少研究到生产的转换瓶颈，同时提供确定性计算能力满足金融监管要求。

title: GIST-CMTF: Goal-State Inference for Causal Minimal Tool Filtering in LLM Agents
summary: Tool-augmented LLM agents rely on runtime filtering to decide which tools should be visible at each step. Causal Minimal Tool Filtering (CMTF) reduces tool-choice confusion by exposing only the next causally necessary tool frontier, but it assumes that the user request has already been mapped to a symbolic goal state. In practice, requests such as "handle my appointment" or "take care of this email" may correspond to multiple possible goals. This creates wrong-goal execution, where an agent follows a valid causal tool path for an unintended objective. We introduce GIST-CMTF, a goal-state inference layer that predicts candidate symbolic goals over the same state-transition vocabulary used by CMTF, estimates ambiguity, and either applies CMTF or exposes clarification as a causal action that produces missing goal or state variables. We evaluate GIST-CMTF across seven model backends, six filtering methods, and 120 controlled tool-use tasks. GIST-CMTF achieves 97.0% task success, compared with 80.1% for top-goal CMTF and 82.9% for semantic-goal CMTF. It reduces wrong-goal execution from 19.4% under top-goal CMTF to 2.5%, while preserving the one-tool exposure of causal filtering and using substantially fewer tokens than all-tools exposure. These results suggest that reliable tool-augmented agents should validate goal state, not only tool relevance, before exposing external actions.

AI.tldr: GIST-CMTF通过增加目标状态推断层来解决工具增强型LLM代理在执行模糊用户请求（如“处理我的约会”）时可能错误地选择因果工具路径的问题，将任务成功率从80.1%提升至97.0%，并将错误目标执行率从19.4%降至2.5%。
AI.motivation: 现有CMTF（因果最小工具过滤）方法假设用户请求已被映射到符号目标状态，但实际中如“处理我的约会”等请求可能对应多个目标，导致代理沿正确的因果工具路径执行错误目标（wrong-goal execution）。
AI.method: GIST-CMTF在CMTF基础上增加目标状态推断层：预测候选符号目标，估计歧义程度，若目标明确则应用CMTF，否则将澄清作为因果动作暴露出来以获取缺失的目标或状态变量。
AI.result: 在7个模型后端、6种过滤方法和120个受控工具使用任务上，GIST-CMTF任务成功率达97.0%（对比top-goal CMTF的80.1%和semantic-goal CMTF的82.9%），错误目标执行率降至2.5%，同时保持了因果过滤的单工具暴露特性且显著减少token消耗。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的工具增强型代理不仅应验证工具相关性，还应在暴露外部操作前验证目标状态的正确性。

title: Parameter-Efficient Adaptation of SAM 3 for Automated ITV Generation from 4DCT Images
summary: Four-dimensional computed tomography (4DCT) captures the full respiratory cycle of thoracic anatomy, yet current Internal Target Volume contouring workflows process each phase in isolation, discarding temporal coherence and leaving contours vulnerable to phase-specific artifacts. We present a lightweight framework that applies parameter-efficient fine-tuning to the Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM 3) via low-rank adaptation (LoRA) to align its text-prompted segmentation with the medical domain using only seven annotated 3D CT volumes. Furthermore, the framework incorporates a hard negative mining strategy to improve boundary discrimination in low-contrast thoracic regions. At inference, phase-wise predictions are refined through phase-coherent temporal filtering and spatial connectivity analysis. Since respiratory motion is continuous and periodic, genuine anatomy appears in contiguous blocks of phases, whereas transient artifacts appear sporadically and are thus effectively suppressed. Experiments on pulmonary and cardiac structures yield median Dice scores of 0.968 and 0.910 with 95th-percentile Hausdorff distances of 0.998 mm and 2.931 mm, respectively. The proposed framework effectively eliminates the severe false-positive predictions inherent in the zero-shot inference of the unadapted SAM 3. With only seven annotated volumes, the framework retains over 95% of full-data accuracy, and the entire pipeline is trainable on a single consumer-grade GPU, demonstrating a scalable, data-efficient solution for adaptive radiotherapy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级框架，通过对SAM 3进行参数高效微调（LoRA），仅用7个标注的3D CT体积即可实现4DCT中胸腹器官的高精度分割，并通过时间滤波和空间连通性分析有效抑制呼吸伪影，在单张消费级GPU上即可训练。
AI.motivation: 当前4DCT的ITV勾画流程逐相处理，忽略了时间连续性，导致分割结果易受特定时相伪影影响，缺乏数据高效且可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 使用LoRA对SAM 3进行参数高效微调，引入困难负样本挖掘策略增强低对比度区域边界判别，推理时通过时相一致的时间滤波和空间连通性分析进行细化，利用呼吸运动的连续周期性抑制瞬时伪影。
AI.result: 肺部和心脏结构的中位Dice分别为0.968和0.910，95百分位Hausdorff距离分别为0.998 mm和2.931 mm，仅用7个标注体积即可保留全数据准确率的95%以上。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效消除了SAM 3零样本推理中的严重假阳性，是一种可扩展、数据高效的适应性放疗解决方案，且可在单张消费级GPU上完成训练。

title: Stop the Sampler! Classifier-Based Adaptive Stopping for Sampling Kernels
summary: Sampling from complex, unnormalized probability densities is a fundamental challenge in Bayesian inference and probabilistic modeling. While Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) methods provide asymptotic guarantees, they often suffer from slow mixing and high computational costs due to fixed or manually tuned trajectory lengths. In this work, we propose a novel framework that treats trajectory termination as a learnable component of the sampling dynamics. By framing MCMC within the theory of non-acyclic generative flow networks (GFlowNets), we train state-dependent neural classifiers to decide when a trajectory has reached a high-density region and should terminate. We theoretically establish the connection between optimal classifiers and the target density via detailed balance conditions and introduce a multilevel training scheme to facilitate exploration in complex geometries. Experimental results across various benchmark densities demonstrate that our approach significantly reduces average trajectory lengths while improving mode coverage and mixing compared to standard MCMC baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将轨迹终止作为可学习组件的MCMC框架，利用非循环生成流网络训练状态依赖的神经网络分类器来决定采样何时终止，显著缩短了轨迹长度并改善了模式覆盖和混合效率。
AI.motivation: 传统MCMC方法由于轨迹长度固定或手动调整，存在混合速度慢、计算成本高的问题，亟需一种自适应终止机制来提升采样效率。
AI.method: 将MCMC框架纳入非循环生成流网络理论，训练状态依赖的神经网络分类器判断何时到达高密度区域；通过详细平衡条件建立最优分类器与目标密度的理论联系，并引入多级训练策略以促进复杂几何空间中的探索。
AI.result: 在多个基准密度上的实验表明，该方法相比标准MCMC基线显著减少了平均轨迹长度，同时改善了模式覆盖率和混合性能。
AI.conclusion: 将轨迹终止学习化是提升MCMC采样效率的有效方向，多级训练和理论保证为复杂分布采样提供了新思路。

title: Symbolic Informalization: Fluent, Productive, Multilingual
summary: Symbolic informalization enables a reliable conversion of formal mathematics to natural language. It has the potential to make machine-checked content human-readable without loss of precision. In a traditional proof system usage, symbolic informalization generalizes the limited mechanisms of syntactic sugar into the ordinary language of mathematics. In a setting where proofs are constructed by artificial intelligence and autoformalization, symbolic informalization can explain what precisely has been constructed. This paper outlines the project Informath, which aims to show how symbolic informalization can produce fluent text with a reasonable development effort and address multiple formal and natural languages. Informath is based on an interlingual architecture, where Dedukti works as a hub between different proof systems (Agda, Lean, Rocq) and Grammatical Framework (GF) takes care of linguistic correctness and variation in different natural languages.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Informath项目，它通过符号非形式化方法将形式化数学可靠地转换为自然语言，结合Dedukti作为不同证明系统（Agda、Lean、Rocq）的枢纽，并使用语法框架（GF）处理多种自然语言的正确性与变体，实现了流畅文本的生成。
AI.motivation: 实现形式化数学内容到自然语言的可靠转换，使机器校验的内容在保持精度的同时可读；在AI构造证明和自动形式化的场景中，能够解释实际构建的内容。
AI.method: 采用符号非形式化方法，基于中间语言架构：以Dedukti作为不同证明系统（Agda、Lean、Rocq）之间的枢纽，结合语法框架（GF）处理多种自然语言的正确性和语言变体。
AI.result: 能够以合理的开发工作量生成流畅的文本，并支持多种形式语言和自然语言。
AI.conclusion: 符号非形式化可以可靠地将形式化数学转换为自然语言，Informath项目证明了这种方法的可行性，为形式化内容的人类可读性提供了有效解决方案。

title: On the Adversarial Robustness of Multimodal LLM Judges
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are increasingly used as automated judges, e.g., for image quality and safety assessment. However, their adversarial robustness remains largely unexplored, threatening the fairness and reliability of automated judging. To bridge this gap, we introduce RobustMLLMJudge, the first general framework for evaluating the adversarial robustness of general-purpose MLLMs when functioning as judges. It covers diverse attacks against popular judge approaches across quality and safety evaluation scenarios. Using RobustMLLMJudge, we reveal that i) different MLLM judges are highly vulnerable to score-inflating adversarial attacks; and ii) although effective, these attack methods face a critical challenge due to unique constraints in the evaluation protocols of MLLM judges. We further propose MGSIA, namely Manifold-Guided Semantic Induction Attack, a novel method that bypasses these constraints to enable more effective and transferable attacks on MLLM judges. The core idea of MGSIA is to combine affirmative semantic induction with high-score manifold alignment: it maximizes the probability that judges yield affirmative responses (e.g., "Yes") to binary semantic queries, while regularizing adversarial representations toward high-score centers estimated from proxy protocols. Together, these objectives yield transferable score-inflating perturbations. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority and generalizability of MGSIA in deceiving advanced MLLM judges under different evaluation scenarios, highlighting the need for robust MLLM judges. Code and data will be made available at https://github.com/mala-lab/RobustMLLMJudge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RobustMLLMJudge框架，用于评估多模态大语言模型作为裁判时的对抗鲁棒性，并提出了MGSIA攻击方法，能够有效绕过评估协议限制，实现分数膨胀攻击。
AI.motivation: MLLMs越来越多地被用作自动裁判（如图像质量和安全性评估），但其对抗鲁棒性尚未被充分探索，这威胁到自动评判的公平性和可靠性。
AI.method: 提出了RobustMLLMJudge通用评估框架，涵盖多种攻击方法；进一步提出MGSIA方法，核心思想是将肯定性语义诱导与高分数流形对齐相结合，最大化裁判对二元语义查询输出肯定响应的概率，同时将对抗表示正则化到高分数中心附近。
AI.result: 不同MLLM裁判极易受到分数膨胀攻击；MGSIA在欺骗先进MLLM裁判方面表现出优越性和泛化性，能有效绕过评估协议约束。
AI.conclusion: 当前MLLM裁判存在严重的安全漏洞，亟需提升其鲁棒性。

title: AME: A Multi-Type Contributor Attribution Framework in Generative AI Markets
summary: Generative AI enables value creation through multi-stage collaboration among heterogeneous contributors, including training data, base models, fine-tuning behaviors, and prompts. However, how to fairly allocate the data value remains largely unexplored. This paper formulates multi-stage generative AI value allocation as a new research problem and identifies three core challenges: heterogeneous data contribution valuation, data rights mapping, and trustworthy execution. We propose AME (Attribution-Mapping-Execution) framework, a unified framework that integrates data contribution valuation, data rights mapping, and trustworthy execution into a single workflow. Experimental results demonstrate that AME framework achieves data value allocation outcomes more consistent with human reference judgments while maintaining low-cost trustworthy execution. Our work provides an initial foundation for value assessment and revenue allocation in generative AI data markets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AME框架，用于解决生成式AI中多阶段协作的数据价值分配问题，实验表明该框架在价值分配上更符合人类判断且执行成本低。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI通过多阶段协作创造价值，但如何公平分配数据价值尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出AME（Attribution-Mapping-Execution）统一框架，整合数据贡献估值、数据权利映射和可信执行三个步骤。
AI.result: AME框架的数据价值分配结果更符合人类参考判断，同时保持低成本的可信执行。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为生成式AI数据市场中的价值评估和收益分配提供了初步基础。

title: Greed Is Learned: Visible Incentives as Reward-Hacking Triggers
